snippet.title: FUR vs MIBR - VCT Americas 26 Kickoff - Upper Bracket
snippet.description:
2025 was another reminder of why America is the strongest region out there: Global Champs, the best rookies, the MVP, and fans that honestly feel unmatched. For 2026, we’re going bigger: more matches, a new roadshow finals experience for Stage 2, and hosting the first international event of the year with Masters Santiago. As we look ahead to the new season, we say goodbye to some legends but welcome ENVY who will be joining us to show his dominance across Challengers.
The road to Champions Shanghai is long, and it all starts with VCT Americas Kickoff, where we’ll get our first look at 12 of the best teams in the world. Step one: conquer Kickoff and grab one of the three tickets to represent the region at Masters Santiago. So… who you got?
We’re proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: Pulsar, Red Bull, Samsung, Secretlab, and Verizon.
Follow the below channels to get the latest information on VCT Americas:

snippet.title: Untitled John Wick Game - Announce Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
Created in collaboration between Saber, Lionsgate, and franchise director Chad Stahelski, the new “Untitled John Wick Game” will feature an original script set in the John Wick timeline, expanding on the franchise’s intricate lore with familiar characters fans already know, as well as completely new ones. Saber’s design will be faithful to the unique style and signature elements of the series, including a distinct gun fu combat system, jaw-dropping camerawork, immersive driving experiences, and a variety of memorable environments, all crafted to make players feel like they are in a John Wick movie, playing the role of John Wick himself.

#ps5 #ps5games #stateofplay #johnwick

snippet.title: HOME | Roxane Bruneau ft Michael Bublé
snippet.description:
C’est lors de la prestigieuse cérémonie des JUNO Awards 2025 que les univers de Roxane et Michael se sont croisés pour la toute première fois. Alors que Michael assurait l’animation de la soirée, Roxane figurait parmi les artistes nommés dans la catégorie Album of the Year, confirmant son ascension remarquable sur la scène musicale.

Réunis pour le numéro d’ouverture, les deux artistes ont livré une interprétation saisissante de « Home », pièce emblématique du répertoire canadien. Une performance vibrante et élégante qui a instantanément marqué le public et l’industrie.

Au lendemain de cette rencontre artistique, Michael a contacté Roxane afin de prolonger la magie de ce moment. De cet échange est née une collaboration inattendu, portée par une admiration mutuelle et une vision artistique commune. Roxane a ainsi la chance d’amener Michael dans son univers musical à travers cette nouvelle version, une pièce signée Mathieu Brisset à la réalisation.

Quelques mois plus tard, ils présentent aujourd’hui une version française revisitée de « Home », offrant une nouvelle profondeur à ce classique intemporel. Cette relecture met en lumière la sensibilité des deux artistes et célèbre le dialogue entre leurs univers musicaux.

Une rencontre fortuite devenue une collaboration d’exception.

Ps: C'est Rox, j'voulais juste que la description fasse big hihi

Quelques mois plus tard, ils présentent aujourd’hui une version française revisitée de « Home », offrant une nouvelle profondeur à ce classique intemporel. Cette relecture met en lumière la sensibilité des deux artistes et célèbre le dialogue entre leurs univers musicaux.

Une rencontre fortuite devenue une collaboration d’exception.

Ps: C'est Rox, j'voulais juste que la description fasse big hihi

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: Launch Gameplay Trailer | Marathon
snippet.description:
Mayday. Mayday. 
MAYDAY. 
MAYD ~~~~%^&*()_+{}:"?~~~~~~~ 

Marathon releases March 5, 2026. 

Play Marathon in the Server Slam weekend from February 26, 2026 to March 2, 2026. This open preview weekend* is available worldwide on Steam, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S with cross-play and cross-save. 

Learn more: https://bung.ie/4654oFP

Pre-order Marathon now: 
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/ 
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/ 
Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b 

Scavenge the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV in the survival extraction FPS from the creators of Halo and Destiny. 

Follow Marathon: 
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame 
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame 
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame 
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net 
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame 
 
Infil into the dark sci-fi world of Tau Ceti IV: A derelict colony rife with rival Runners, hostile UESC security forces, and unpredictable environments. Play with your crew, as a solo Runner, or form uneasy alliances with proximity chat. Scavenge, buildcraft, and take on greater challenges–culminating with the derelict Marathon ship hanging above. 

*Gameplay requires internet access and paid-for subscription on console (sold separately)

snippet.title: EVERYTHING You MISSED In CHAPTER 5’S GAMEPLAY TRAILER (Lore and Theories)
snippet.description:
The CHAPTER 5 Gameplay Trailer EXPLAINED (Secrets and Theories)
Chapter 5’s gameplay trailer is finally here and it might’ve just revealed EVERYTHING. In this full breakdown, we go scene by scene analyzing Huggy’s possible death at the hands of the Prototype, the return of old toys like catnap, doey the doughman, and mommy long legs through poppy gel experiments, and our first terrifying look at the Prototype’s stitched face and yellow eye. We dive into the new lab, the massive cave systems, wrongside outimals being rebuilt, living mushroom creatures, and what could be the origin of the poppy gel itself. Plus we break down the brand-new Grab Pack hands, the star walkie talkie mechanics, Lily Lovebraid's hide-and-seek style boss fight, Huggy chase scenes, Boxy Boo hints, the conditioning rooms, and Poppy and Kissy’s capture. Is the Prototype a former Poppy? Are the toys being turned inside out to revive them? And what role does the mysterious memory machine play in all of this? Let’s break down every hidden detail from the Chapter 5 trailer.

If you want the full story and theories connecting it all, this is for you.
